summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Suhani's 23rd Birthday website. All major features working correctly including confetti animations, photo gallery lightbox, flip cards, Among Us voting modal, Sage relax mode, reservation modal, Master's progress bar, and mobile responsiveness.

design_issues.details: Missing DialogTitle and Description for accessibility compliance in lightbox and reservation modals
design_issues.impact: Accessibility compliance only, functionality works perfectly

passed_tests: Hero section confetti button triggers animation successfully
Emergency meeting button scrolls to Among Us section (with force click)
Photo gallery displays all 11 photos in polaroid style correctly
Lightbox opens, navigates (prev/next), and closes properly
All 6 flip cards display and respond to hover effects
Among Us voting modal opens and displays results correctly
Sage relax mode toggle activates music button and changes styling
Four Olives reservation modal opens and closes properly
Master's progress bar animates from 23% to higher values
Send Encouragement button reveals hidden motivational message
Replay confetti buttons work in both hero and footer sections
Fixed audio toggle visible and functional
All 9 navigation dots work for section scrolling
All interactive elements properly sized for touch devices
Mobile photo gallery and lightbox work flawlessly
Mobile voting and modals function correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor accessibility improvements: Add proper DialogTitle and aria-describedby attributes to lightbox and reservation modals for screen reader compliance. This is a low-priority enhancement as functionality is perfect.
